title: Recover 3 valid features the clean-exit false-FAIL bug discarded (cycles 862-899): tier-fallback (876), skill-overlay/evo:fable injection (897/884), scoped-review (898) — land the best implementation of each through the pipeline
summary: Blast-radius audit of the clean-exit deliverable-authority bug (fixed 38b961d2) found 10 cycles false-FAILed (audit PASS + ACS PASS, discarded). They cluster into 3 features ABSENT from main, each built + verified-green but never landed. Their deliverables survive as UNCOMMITTED work in the cycle worktrees (.evolve/worktrees/cycle-21f9f7ae-<N>). cycle-899 (MergeFallbacks) was already recovered in 38b961d2. Fleet-partition (882) is already on main. The genuine FAILs (889/894/895/896 — real coverage/defect issues) are correctly rejected: do NOT land as-is.
root_cause: The clean-exit verdict-surface bug recorded FAIL while artifacts were green, so the loop discarded every green attempt and re-built the same features 5-8x. The ADR-0072 floor (shipped d531fc32) prevents recurrence, but the already-built work still needs landing.
fix: Per DISTINCT feature, land the best verified implementation through the normal pipeline (TDD + audit + ship), NOT a blind stack of overlapping old diffs: (A) tier-fallback [worktree cycle-21f9f7ae-876]: llmroute/tier_fallback.go TierChain+DispatchTiered + Plan.Tiers + core/quota_exhaustion. Applies cleanly to main; verified PASS+ACS 7/7. NOTE it is INERT — includes runner_tier_fallback_reproduction_test.go (deliberately RED) proving the production call-site swap (runner Dispatch->DispatchTiered) is NOT done. Landing it also needs the wiring to make fable->opus fallback live (the operator's urgent ask). (B) skill-overlay / evo:fable injection [best: cycle-21f9f7ae-897, also 884]: bridge/skill_overlay.go + engine/ports/overlays/runner wiring so deep/high/medium phases load the /evo:fable skill. 884's audit flagged a SECURITY gate: skills/fable/ must be added to ProtectedSurfaceManifest (guards/integrity_surface.go) via a human-gated manual ship. (C) scoped-review [best PASS: cycle-21f9f7ae-898]: phases/ship/scopedreview.go — audit review scoped to touched pkgs. The 889/894/895/896 iterations FAILed on real coverage gaps; do the coverage properly.
acceptance: tier-fallback machinery on main + the production call-site swap (runner Dispatch->DispatchTiered) so fable->opus fallback is LIVE on exit 85 (not inert); regression test proving the step-down.
skill-overlay: deep/high/medium phases load /evo:fable before task; skills/fable/ added to ProtectedSurfaceManifest via manual ship (security gate).
scoped-review: landed with real coverage (the gap that FAILed 889/894/895/896).
Each lands via the pipeline (audit PASS + ACS + ship); no blind diff-stacking.
connects_to: the operator's pending 'wire fable->opus auto-fallback' ask (feature A) + 'phases load /evo:fable skill' ask (feature B)
notes: Deliverables are UNCOMMITTED in the worktrees (durable while worktrees exist; NOT git-committed). Session-scoped patches were exported to scratchpad/recovery/*.patch (ephemeral). If worktrees risk GC, harvest via: cd <worktree> && git add -A && git diff --cached. tier-fallback (A) is the highest-value + operator-urgent; skill-overlay (B) needs the security-manifest step. Genuine FAILs 889/894/895/896 are NOT recoverable as-is.
